Spring Data Elasticsearch
  1. org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.core.geo

Uses of Package
org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.core.geo

Packages that use org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.core.geo
Package
Description
org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.client.elc
This package contains classes that use the new Elasticsearch client library (co.elastic.clients:elasticsearch-java) to access Elasticsearch.
org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.core.convert
 
org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.core.geo
 
org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.core.query
 
  • Classes in org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.core.geo used by org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.client.elc
    Class
    Description
    GeoPoint
    geo-location used for #Criteria.
  • Classes in org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.core.geo used by org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.core.convert
    Class
    Description
    GeoJson
    Interface definition for structures defined in GeoJSON format. copied from Spring Data Mongodb
    GeoJsonGeometryCollection
    Defines a GeoJsonGeometryCollection that consists of a List of GeoJson objects.
    Copied from Spring Data Mongodb
    GeoJsonLineString
    GeoJsonLineString is defined as list of Points.
    Copied from Spring Data Mongodb
    GeoJsonMultiLineString
    GeoJsonMultiLineString is defined as list of GeoJsonLineStrings.
    GeoJsonMultiPoint
    GeoJsonMultiPoint is defined as list of Points.
    Copied from Spring Data Mongodb
    GeoJsonMultiPolygon
    GeoJsonMultiPolygon is defined as a list of GeoJsonPolygons.
    Copied fro Spring Data Mongodb.
    GeoJsonPoint
    GeoJson representation of Point.
    Copied from Spring Data Mongodb, not derived from Point as this conflicts with the already existing converter for Point in GeoConverters.
    GeoJsonPolygon
    GeoJson representation of a polygon.
    GeoPoint
    geo-location used for #Criteria.
  • Classes in org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.core.geo used by org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.core.geo
    Class
    Description
    GeoBox
    Geo bbox used for #Criteria.
    GeoJson
    Interface definition for structures defined in GeoJSON format. copied from Spring Data Mongodb
    GeoJsonGeometryCollection
    Defines a GeoJsonGeometryCollection that consists of a List of GeoJson objects.
    Copied from Spring Data Mongodb
    GeoJsonLineString
    GeoJsonLineString is defined as list of Points.
    Copied from Spring Data Mongodb
    GeoJsonMultiLineString
    GeoJsonMultiLineString is defined as list of GeoJsonLineStrings.
    GeoJsonMultiPoint
    GeoJsonMultiPoint is defined as list of Points.
    Copied from Spring Data Mongodb
    GeoJsonMultiPolygon
    GeoJsonMultiPolygon is defined as a list of GeoJsonPolygons.
    Copied fro Spring Data Mongodb.
    GeoJsonPoint
    GeoJson representation of Point.
    Copied from Spring Data Mongodb, not derived from Point as this conflicts with the already existing converter for Point in GeoConverters.
    GeoJsonPolygon
    GeoJson representation of a polygon.
    GeoPoint
    geo-location used for #Criteria.
